name: surveyjs-adapter-demos
description: SurveyJS V3 theme adapter demos (Bootstrap, shadcn, MUI) over a single shared schema package.

scripts.dev:bootstrap: concurrently -k -n core,react-ui,demo -c blue,magenta,green "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-library/packages/survey-core" "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-library/packages/survey-react-ui" "npm run dev --workspace @adapter/bootstrap"
scripts.dev:bootstrap:creator: concurrently -k -n core,react-ui,creator-core,creator-react,demo -c blue,magenta,cyan,yellow,green "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-library/packages/survey-core" "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-library/packages/survey-react-ui" "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-creator/packages/survey-creator-core" "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-creator/packages/survey-creator-react" "npm run dev --workspace @adapter/bootstrap"
scripts.dev:mui: concurrently -k -n core,react-ui,demo -c blue,magenta,green "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-library/packages/survey-core" "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-library/packages/survey-react-ui" "npm run dev --workspace @adapter/mui"
scripts.dev:shadcn: concurrently -k -n core,react-ui,demo -c blue,magenta,green "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-library/packages/survey-core" "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-library/packages/survey-react-ui" "npm run dev --workspace @adapter/shadcn"
